Architecture, history & the built environment across Asia
Field Notes — Asian Cities

Cities as
Palimpsest

Walking guides to the built environment

Each of these cities carries its history in its built fabric — successive regimes, trade networks, colonial encounters, and modernization projects layered over each other without fully replacing what came before. These guides read the architecture and urban form as evidence. The food recommendations are at the end.
